text: In today's video, we are going to see this cheat sheet which I have made for you. If you are a Python developer or you do Python programming then it can prove very useful for you on the phone. If you take a look at this cheat sheet then you will see that I have added all the syntax in it. And I have been using this kind of cheat sheet for a long time and I have improved it even more by adding a lot of things in it. For example, you can see here how to show the output that is how to print anything from the input function to the dictionaries escape sequence characters then list, all methods of strings and there are those methods in it which you will probably use that is the most useful things I have added in this cheat sheet. If you are using it on the phone then you can open a tab in Chrome and then copy and paste it in your online IDE you can practice Python you will get an overall idea by looking at this cheat sheet of Python. Now if you are using a source code editor like VS Code then yes I know that you write any method and it comes by writing a dot whatever methods are there, they come but sometimes what happens that which method do we have to use and then no method exists or not this thing is very difficult to find out and this cheat sheet lists all the things at once and gives you an overall idea of Python programming language too so I hope this thing will be helpful for you and if you have any feedback then do tell me in the comment section below that what else can be done with this cheat sheet is there anything that I should add is there anything like this which I could have demonstrated better so do tell me all those things and my plan is that I will definitely put cheat sheets of all the other languages because this is a very good tool in my opinion this is a very good tool you have a cheat sheet you are coding in any language and by coding you are directly picking everything from here everything is in front of you this thing becomes very helpful so I have made a playlist of cheat sheets you must access it in this too you must be seeing cheat sheets of HTML, CSS and JavaScript but maybe if you are watching this video even after a short time then you will definitely get to see other cheat sheets here I hope this thing will be very helpful for you any updates or changes will be there I will keep updating this cheat sheet if you want to print out this or you want to save it as a PDF by pressing ctrl P you can save as PDF and its PDF will be ready for you you can also paste it on the wall that's all for now guys thank you so much guys for watching this video and I will see you next time
